chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 51 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6929/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6930/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6931/2025 (R/Surety) 05.12.2025 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by applicant Sohail Ahmed Shaikh seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Abdul Waheed was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 22.01.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing an original defence savings certificate of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 20.03.2025. Subsequently, the accused has been let off by the police in Column-II of the charge sheet, as is evident from the diary dated 10.04.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulazar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
